basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore – Deputy General Manager – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIM Indore Recruitment 2026 notification out for Deputy General Manager (Career Services) post. Apply online at iimidr.ac.in on or before 13 June 2026. Check eligibility, qualification, and salary details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Management (MBA/PGDM) or equivalent qualification from a recognised institution.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated monthly pay package subject to satisfactory performance, reviewed on an annual basis. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Indore Deputy General Manager (Career Services) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIM Indore Deputy General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
